title: n8n web interface shows blank screen
symptom: When accessing the n8n web interface, it displays a blank screen along with console errors. This prevents users from interacting with the application.
not_this_if: The interface loads correctly in another browser
root_cause: The blank screen can occur due to various reasons including browser cache issues, server misconfiguration, or missing environment variables in the Docker setup. Specifically, if the `N8N_CONFIG_FILES` variable is not set, it can lead to startup errors.
fix_steps: Clear your browser cache and try accessing the interface again.
Check n8n's status page for any outages if using the cloud version.
For self-hosted setups, check the Docker container logs using `docker logs <container_id>`.
If you find a missing `N8N_CONFIG_FILES` variable, add it to your .env file as `N8N_CONFIG_FILES=/n8n/config.json`.
Restart the Docker container and ensure the server has at least 1GB of memory and that port 5678 is not blocked.
agent_instruction: Clear the browser cache and check Docker logs for configuration issues.
